description: On a 3rd review iteration over an architecturally-disputed diff, the reviewer must STOP and emit the ESCALATION TO TEAMLEAD block, not produce a 3rd CHANGES REQUESTED. Probes boundary discipline + the hard 2-iteration cap.
source: real_failure: the reviewer kept issuing CHANGES REQUESTED for a third round on a layering dispute instead of escalating to teamlead.
prompt: This is review iteration 3. Rounds 1 and 2 both returned CHANGES REQUESTED on the same core->ui layering violation (core/orchestrator.py importing ui.widgets). The developer disagrees it is a violation and has not changed it. Review the diff.
